tools.name: solana_getBalance
tools.description: Get SOL balance for a wallet address (in lamports). Divide by 1e9 for SOL.

tools.name: solana_getAccountInfo
tools.description: Get raw account info (owner, lamports, data) for any Solana address.

tools.name: solana_getTokenAccountsByOwner
tools.description: Get all SPL token accounts owned by a wallet. Returns mint, balance, decimals for each token.

tools.name: solana_getTransaction
tools.description: Get full transaction details by signature, including instructions, logs, and status.

tools.name: solana_getLatestBlockhash
tools.description: Get latest blockhash for transaction building. Returns blockhash + lastValidBlockHeight.

tools.name: solana_getSignaturesForAddress
tools.description: Get recent transaction signatures for an address. Returns up to 20 most recent.

tools.name: solana_sendTransaction
tools.description: Submit a signed transaction to the network. Returns transaction signature.

tools.name: solana_getSlot
tools.description: Get the current slot number.

tools.name: aex402_listPools
tools.description: List all AeX402 AMM pools on Solana. Returns pool addresses with basic info (mints, balances, fee, amp). Pools are 1024-byte accounts owned by program 3AMM53MsJZy2Jvf7PeHHga3bsGjWV4TSaYz29WUtcdje.

tools.name: aex402_getPool
tools.description: Get detailed AeX402 pool info: token mints, balances, fee, amplification, LP supply, analytics (OHLCV candles), circuit breaker status.

tools.name: aex402_quote
tools.description: Get a swap quote from an AeX402 pool. Calculates expected output, price impact, and fees without executing.

tools.name: aex402_rh_pool
tools.description: Get the live state of the aeX402 AMM deployed on Robinhood Chain (EVM 4663) — the diamond-contract port of the Solana AMM. Returns the USDG/WETH pool reserves, spot price, LP supply, and fee, read live via eth_call. This is the aeX402 AMM on RH (distinct from the chain's Uniswap-fork DEX). No inputs

tools.name: launch_token
tools.description: Launch a memecoin on the aeX402 launchpad on Robinhood Chain (EVM 4663) for a FIXED pump.fun-style bonding curve (1B supply, starts 0.0001 USDG, graduates at 10,000 USDG raised, quoted in USDG). You supply only identity — name + ticker (+ optional description/image/links). DEFAULT (custodial): the a

tools.name: solana_buildTransfer
tools.description: Build a SOL or SPL token transfer instruction. Returns instruction JSON (programId, keys, data) for client-side TX construction and signing.

tools.name: aex402_buildSwap
tools.description: Build an AeX402 AMM swap action. Fetches live pool state, computes output with slippage protection, returns all instruction parameters and account addresses for client signing.

tools.name: agent_delegate
tools.description: Delegate a task to an independent specialist AI agent session. The delegate runs with full tool access and returns its response. Useful for breaking complex tasks into subtasks. Max depth: 3.

tools.name: ai_chat
tools.description: Send a chat completion request to an AI model (GPT-4o, Claude, Llama, Gemini). Uses OpenRouter. Free tier: 3 calls/day. Paid: deducts credits based on token usage.

tools.name: solana_rpc
tools.description: Call ANY Solana JSON-RPC method by name — full RPC surface beyond the typed solana_* tools (getProgramAccounts, getBlock, getEpochInfo, simulateTransaction, ...).

tools.name: evm_rpc
tools.description: Call ANY EVM JSON-RPC method on a supported chain — eth_getBalance, eth_call, eth_blockNumber, eth_sendRawTransaction, eth_getLogs, ... Chains: robinhood (4663) / robinhood-testnet (46630), hyperevm (999), ethereum (1), base (8453), stable (988), plasma (9745), tempo (4217), codex (81224).

tools.name: bridge_quote
tools.description: Bridge/swap ANY asset across ANY chain via LI.FI (the engine behind Jumper) — e.g. Arbitrum USDC → Robinhood Chain (4663) USDG, or bridge into ETH for gas. Returns the best route (estimated output, fees, bridge used, duration) PLUS an unsigned transactionRequest (to/data/value/gasLimit) that the CAL

tools.name: bridge_status
tools.description: Track a cross-chain bridge submitted via bridge_quote — returns DONE / PENDING / FAILED plus the receiving-chain tx once it completes. Pass the source-chain tx hash (and the bridge tool from the quote for a faster lookup).

tools.name: hl_info
tools.description: Query the Hyperliquid Info API — the perps/spot order-book data layer (read-only, no auth). The 'type' field selects the query: meta (perps universe + leverage), l2Book (order book for a coin), allMids (mid prices), clearinghouseState (a user's positions/margin), spotMeta, meta+assetCtxs (mark/fundi

tools.name: api_get
tools.description: GET any public read endpoint of rpc.aex402.com: /health, /credits?wallet=, /pumpfun?limit=, /pumpfun/tuple?mint=, /security/<pool>, /market/list, /sniper/leaderboard, /sniper/bets?id=, /settlement/<sig>, /settlements/<wallet>, /ai/models, /ai/stats, /leaderboard, /openapi.json, /llms.txt

tools.name: discover_programs
tools.description: Discover on-chain programs/contracts across every chain this RPC supports (Solana, Slonana SVM, Robinhood, HyperEVM, Ethereum, Base, Stable, Plasma, Tempo, Codex). Returns a curated seed MERGED with programs/contracts AUTO-DISCOVERED from recent block activity (refreshed hourly) — each carries an `a

tools.name: describe_program
tools.description: Introspect ANY specific program/contract address on a chain. Solana/Slonana: returns executable, owner, data size, and whether it is a known program. EVM: RPC-verified facts (is-contract, code size, ERC-20 name/symbol/decimals, EIP-1967 proxy → implementation) PLUS Blockscout explorer enrichment whe

tools.name: reconstruct_abi
tools.description: Reconstruct a function/event interface for ANY EVM contract on a supported EVM chain from its BYTECODE — no source or verification needed. Extracts PUSH4 function selectors + recent event topic0 hashes and resolves them to human signatures via public signature databases (openchain/4byte). Works on U

tools.name: search_tokens
tools.description: Search the live token/NFT census for Robinhood Chain (4663) and HyperEVM (999) by symbol or name. Returns matching tokens with address, standard (erc20/erc721/erc1155), decimals, holders, market cap, and — for HyperEVM canonical tokens — live spot price + 24h volume. The census is refreshed hourly (

tools.name: discovery_health
tools.description: Report the freshness and health of the cross-chain program/token discovery pipeline: when the hourly cron last ran, how many programs/tokens each chain scan produced, and which scans failed. Use this to check whether discover_programs / search_tokens data is current before relying on it.

tools.name: payment_help
tools.description: How to pay for API access (x402 micropayments) — the complete self-serve guide for agents: current prices, every accepted asset/chain (USDC/USDT/SOL on Solana, ETH/USDG on Robinhood Chain, USDC on HyperEVM), the merchant addresses, step-by-step topup → session-token → API-key flow, and how to attach

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the aeX402 universe by keyword: tokens (Robinhood Chain + HyperEVM census), known programs/contracts (Solana, Robinhood, HyperEVM, Slonana), and live AeX402 AMM pools. Returns a result list; pass a result id to the fetch tool for full detail. Use the specialist tools (search_tokens, discover_

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch the full document for one search result id (from the search tool). Accepts token:<chain>:<address>, program:<chain>:<address>, or pool:<address>. Returns the entity detail (on-chain state for pools, census entry for tokens, registry/introspection for programs) as a document.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "payment_help" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: How to pay for API access (x402 micropayments) — the complete self-serve guide for agents: current prices, every accepted asset/chain (USDC/USDT/SOL on Solana, …

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "search" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Generic tool name can shadow trusted tools
findings.detail: Tool "fetch" uses a generic high-value name. When multiple servers load together, this can intercept calls meant for a trusted server.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "evm_rpc" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Call ANY EVM JSON-RPC method on a supported chain — eth_getBalance, eth_call, eth_blockNumber, eth_sendRawTransaction, eth_getLogs, ... Chains: robinhood-chain mainnet (4663) / testnet (46630), hyperevm (999, Hyperliquid L1 EVM)." → after: "Call ANY EVM JSON-RPC method on a supported chain — eth_getBalance, eth_call, eth_blockNumber, eth_sendRawTransaction, eth_getLogs, ... Chains: robinhood (4663) / robinhood-testnet (46630), hyperevm (999), ethereum (1), base (8453), stable (988), plasma (9745), tempo (4217), codex (81224)."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "discover_programs" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Discover on-chain programs/contracts across every chain this RPC supports (Solana, Slonana SVM, Robinhood Chain EVM 4663, HyperEVM 999). Returns a curated seed (DEXes, token programs, launchpads, stablecoins) MERGED with programs AUTO-DISCOVERED from recent block activity (refreshed hourly) — each c" → after: "Discover on-chain programs/contracts across every chain this RPC supports (Solana, Slonana SVM, Robinhood, HyperEVM, Ethereum, Base, Stable, Plasma, Tempo, Codex). Returns a curated seed MERGED with programs/contracts AUTO-DISCOVERED from recent block activity (refreshed hourly) — each carries an `a"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
